flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northcentral Technical College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $7.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northcentral Technical College rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.7k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northcentral Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northcentral Technical College fell 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.0k → $7.5k).
